name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top-tier Original M12425 Single-zip Wallet Introducing the new Margot Wallet, a stylish piece that achieves a perfect balance between contemporary and classic design. It is made from the iconic Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring polished gold hardware, including a metal plate engraved with the iconic Louis Vuitton signature. The interior offers multiple pockets and compartments for coins and bills, plus six card slots. Size 17 x 11 x 2cm
